name: Basic Stock for Soups
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil, skimming off any foam from the top.
3. Reduce heat and cover the pan.
4. Simmer for 2 to 2 1/2 hours.
5. Strain the stock when it has cooled slightly.
6. Refrigerate the strained stock.
7. Discard the chicken, gingerroot, and onions as they no longer contribute flavor.
8. Before using, lift any fat that has risen to the top of the cold stock.
9. The stock will keep in the refrigerator for 3 or 4 days. If storing longer, freeze it.
